task_completion.description: Navigate to the USDA FoodData Central database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the URL bar showing 'fdc.nal.usda.gov' or the USDA FoodData Central homepage is visible.

task_completion.description: Extract the correct Protein value for raw chicken breast.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition report contains an entry for raw chicken breast showing a protein value between 20.0g and 25.0g (specifically around 21.2g) per 100g.

task_completion.description: Extract the correct Carbohydrate value for raw sweet potato.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition report contains an entry for raw sweet potato showing a carbohydrate value between 18.0g and 22.0g (specifically around 20.1g) per 100g.

task_completion.description: Extract the correct Vitamin C value for raw broccoli.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition report contains an entry for raw broccoli showing a Vitamin C (total ascorbic acid) value between 80.0mg and 100.0mg (specifically around 89.2mg) per 100g.

task_completion.description: Create and format the nutrition report at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows a file saved at '/home/ga/Documents/nutrition_report.txt'. The contents must be clearly formatted, such as a table or list with columns/sections for 'Item', 'Nutrient', and 'Value'.

task_completion.description: Download the full CSV or JSON data file for the Sweet Potato entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing the '/home/ga/Downloads/' directory containing a newly downloaded CSV or JSON file related to sweet potato, or a browser download popup confirming the file was saved to this location.

integrity.description: The agent actively searched the USDA database rather than hallucinating the nutritional values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing search queries for the ingredients on the USDA FoodData Central website and clicking on 'SR Legacy' or 'Foundation' results.

integrity.description: The report file was genuinely created and saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the correct file path '/home/ga/Documents/nutrition_report.txt' in its title bar or save dialog, or a terminal command (like 'cat' or 'ls') confirms the file exists on disk.

integrity.description: The sweet potato data file was genuinely downloaded from the USDA website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows interaction with a download button on the USDA website for the sweet potato entry, and the browser's download manager indicates a successful download.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: fdc.nal.usda.gov. Verified values for the report: Raw chicken breast protein is ~21.2g per 100g (accept 20.0-25.0g). Raw sweet potato carbohydrates by difference is ~20.1g per 100g (accept 18.0-22.0g). Raw broccoli vitamin C (total ascorbic acid) is ~89.2mg per 100g (accept 80.0-100.0mg). The report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_report.txt. The sweet potato data file (CSV or JSON) must be downloaded to /home/ga/Downloads/.
